{{Infobox artifact
| name = Storm Core
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Storm [[Core]] is an extraordinary treasure and sphere of immense power derived from the [[Weeping Dragon]]. It contains overwhelming amounts of lightning and water energy, which can manifest as natural spirits such as massive stormclouds with arm-like limbs. Over many centuries, the presence of this core has caused storm-related energy to accumulate within its chamber. Historically, the Storm [[Core]] was housed in a location originally intended for the [[Blood Core]]; these two objects were swapped long ago to alter the function of the script they power. [[Reigan Shen]] eventually returned the Storm [[Core]] to its proper altar, an act part of a larger effort to restore the correct placement of several cores to transform [[Sacred Valley]]. Additionally, the core's influence can be felt through objects like [[Samara's ring]], which becomes infused with blue lightning due to the core's presence deep within a [[labyrinth]].}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Born from the power of the [[Weeping Dragon]], the Storm [[Core]] is an impossible treasure that manifests as a sapphire-like sphere the size of [[Reigan Shen]]'s torso. This artifact emits a beam of blue energy and contains crackling lightning within its form. The core's immense power even gave rise to a natural spirit shaped like a massive stormcloud with two thick, arm-like limbs. Historically, the object was positioned upon an altar that now serves as the resting place for the [[Blood Core]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Core]] is an impossible treasure born from the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Core]] is a shining sphere the size of [[Reigan Shen]]'s torso that looks like a sapphire and emits a beam of blue energy.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Lightning crackles inside the [[Storm Core]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Core]]'s power formed a natural spirit in the shape of a huge stormcloud with two limbs resembling thick arms.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Core]] was previously placed on the altar where the [[Blood Core]] is now being placed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Core]] is an artifact placed on an altar.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Core]] is located deeper in the [[labyrinth]] and powers [[Samara]]’s ring.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
